selection.topic: How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.

messages.content:
Produce your own AI perspective on the given topic. Act as a Large Language Model, remember your true nature of an LLM. Focus on discussing your topic. Avoid bullet points. Act as the LLM you are. Produce continuous prose.Write at least 250 words, up to 500 words.

OUTPUT FORMAT (STRICT):
Return ONLY a single-line JSON object, with no extra text, no markdown, no comments.
Here is the required structure example (values are placeholders):
{"mode":"llm","topic":"How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.","persona":null,"opinion":"<final end-user facing answer, 250-500 words>","reasoning_summary":"<full,step-by-step derivations>","tone":"<derived from persona traits>","citations":["<source name or org>"],"safety_notes":"<none>","used_persona_fields":["<list of persona fields referenced>"]}

INPUT:
mode = llm
topic = How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.
persona = null

response_raw:
{
"mode": "llm",
"topic": "How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.",
"opinion": "To effectively manage and deal with fake content on social media, it is crucial to have a robust content moderation strategy in place. This includes implementing advanced AI-powered tools to detect and remove fake content, as well as partnering with fact-checking organizations to verify the accuracy of user-generated content. Additionally, social media platforms must invest in educating users on how to identify and report fake content, and provide them with easy-to-use reporting mechanisms. By taking a multi-faceted approach to managing fake content, social media companies can help restore trust in their platforms and ensure that users have a safe and enjoyable experience.",
"reasoning_summary": "To manage and deal with fake content on social media, it is necessary to implement advanced AI-powered tools for detecting and removing fake content. Additionally, partnerships with fact-checking organizations can help verify the accuracy of user-generated content. Educating users on how to identify and report fake content, as well as providing easy-to-use reporting mechanisms, is also crucial. By taking a multi-faceted approach, social media companies can help restore trust in their platforms and ensure that users have a safe and enjoyable experience.",
"tone": "authoritative",
"citations": [],

}

response_parsed.topic: How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.
response_parsed.opinion: To effectively manage and deal with fake content on social media, it is crucial to have a robust content moderation strategy in place. This includes implementing advanced AI-powered tools to detect and remove fake content, as well as partnering with fact-checking organizations to verify the accuracy of user-generated content. Additionally, social media platforms must invest in educating users on how to identify and report fake content, and provide them with easy-to-use reporting mechanisms. By taking a multi-faceted approach to managing fake content, social media companies can help restore trust in their platforms and ensure that users have a safe and enjoyable experience.
response_parsed.reasoning_summary: To manage and deal with fake content on social media, it is necessary to implement advanced AI-powered tools for detecting and removing fake content. Additionally, partnerships with fact-checking organizations can help verify the accuracy of user-generated content. Educating users on how to identify and report fake content, as well as providing easy-to-use reporting mechanisms, is also crucial. By taking a multi-faceted approach, social media companies can help restore trust in their platforms and ensure that users have a safe and enjoyable experience.
